Aug 14, 2015 CONTENTS: Jython Bug Reports Jython ------ The Jython Environment for Students versions 4 and 5 (https://code.google.com/p/mediacomp-jes/) is installed on all of the Instructional Linux computers. They can be s

the Instructional Linux computers. They can be started with the case-sensitive commands: /share/b/bin/JES4 /share/b/bin/jes5 The software is installed in /share/b/jar/JES4/ /share/b/jar/jes5/ with sym links to them from /share/in

jar/jes5/ with sym links to them from /share/instsww/pkg/ for convenience. See http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/connecting.html for current information about accessing the Instuctional computers. Bug Reports ----------- Please report problem
. Bug Reports ----------- Please report problems with software on the Instructional systems to inst@eecs.berkeley.edu. Instructional Support Group 378/386/384 Cory, 333 Soda inst@eecs.berkeley.edu
